title: Week of April 13, 2026
summary: This week brought important stability improvements to OpsPal's licensing system, eliminating disruptions that could interrupt your workflow. We also expanded and refined our skills library to provide better guidance for common RevOps scenarios.

entries.headline: License activation now works reliably without interruptions
details: Your OpsPal access stays active without unexpected logouts or activation loops
You'll receive clear warnings when your license is approaching expiration

entries.headline: Enhanced skills library with better organization and coverage
details: Updated skill guides now have consistent naming and proper placement
Added missing templates to help you get started with new automation projects faster
